price: Hierauf ergriff Ich diejenigen, die ungläubig waren. Wie war da Meine Mißbilligung!
arabic: ثُمَّ أَخَذۡتُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْۖ فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ نَكِيرِ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: thumma akhadhtu alladhīna kafarū fakayfa kāna nakīri
